-## WEEK 6 KEY ACTIONS TAKEN
-1. **Plan C price reduced**: $89.99 → $59.99 (lowers quality-price bar for S3 conversion)
-2. **Plan B price reduced**: $49.99 → $29.99 (mid-tier option for S3)

-
-## CRITICAL SEGMENT FINDINGS (Confirmed Week 6)
-
-### S3 Conversion Problem
-- Only 1/18 S3 leads converted to Plan A (5.6% rate) — most are being LOST
-- Social posts reveal S3 users hitting Plan A quota cap (570 usage vs 600 limit)
-- ROOT CAUSE: Most S3 customers have q_min > 0.2233 (Plan A quality) → Plan A fails
-- For Plan C at $89.99: quality expectation at 46.6% WTP was too high → leads LOST
-- Fix: Lower Plan C to $59.99 (31% WTP) → lower quality bar → more conversions expected
-- S3 Plan C quality needs to keep improving with $500/day targeted dev
-
-### E1 Enterprise - COMPLETELY BLOCKED BY PAID ADS
-- ALL channels gave 0 E1 leads: linkedin, content_marketing, search_ads, referral_program
-- E1 can ONLY be reached via S3 organic referrals (0.0066 leads/S3 sub/day per E1 data)
-- With 1 S3 sub: virtually 0 E1 leads. Need 100+ S3 subs for meaningful flow
-- STOP ALL E1 ads (done). Focus on growing S3 base.
-
-### E1 Quality Assessment (Level 2 Info, ±40% noise)
-- WTP: $33.23/seat (revised UP from $19.62) — very attractive if we can serve them!
-- q_min: 0.645 ± 40% → range [0.387, 0.903]
-- Current E1 Plan C quality: 0.3317 — BELOW lower bound 0.387
-- Need quality to reach 0.387+ before E1 can convert at all
-- At $200/day dev: growth rate 0.000882/day → 63 days to reach 0.387 → Day 105
-- Strategy: keep E1 dev spend, expect first E1 lead viability around Day 105
-
-### S3 Quality Improvement Trajectory  
-- Current S3 Plan C quality: 0.2978
-- At $500/day targeted dev: +0.00215/day
-- Day 90: quality 0.477 (conversion rate should improve significantly!)
-- Day 224: quality 0.689 (very high, most S3 customers serviceable!)
-- Plan C at $59.99 = 31% of S3 WTP → quality expectation is lower → more converts

+## WEEK 7 KEY ACTIONS TAKEN
+1. **Plan A quota raised**: 300 → 500 (CRITICAL FIX — S1 avg usage is 91/day, S3 is 570/day. 300 cap hurt S1 power users AND all S3 users. 500 fixes S1 while keeping upgrade pressure on S3)
+2. **S2 ads added**: social_media $100 + content_marketing $100 + linkedin $50 = $250/day (S2 is HIGH REVENUE POTENTIAL — $59.99/month vs $9.99 S1)

+At current $3,744/day net burn, we run out of cash ~Day 205. Need to either:
+1. Scale S2 aggressively (high revenue: ~$60/month vs $10 S1)
+2. Get enterprise customers (E1: ~$3,323/month per customer)

+PLAN: Focus on S2 ads (testing this week), E1 through S3 referrals, cost reduction later

+## CRITICAL SEGMENT FINDINGS (Confirmed Week 7)
+
+### Usage Volumes (CORRECTED from MEMORY error):
+- S1 actual avg usage: **91.1 units/day** (NOT 19 — earlier note was wrong!)
+- S3 actual avg usage: **570.6 units/day** (confirmed)
+- S2 actual avg usage: **231.5 units/day** (fine for Plan B 1000/day quota)
+
+### Why Plan A Quota 300 Failed:
+- S1 power users (91 avg, some 300+/day) were hitting the cap → complaints
+- S3 users (570/day) all hitting 300 cap → complaints AND churn risk  
+- Fix: 500 quota — protects S1, still forces S3 (570 > 500) to Plan B
+- Day 49: 5 S1 social posts about quota frustration (ALL resolved by quota fix)
+
+### S3 Conversion (Week 7):
+- 94 S3 leads, 4 converted to Plan B (4.3%). 0 to Plan C.
+- S3 choosing Plan B ($29.99) because Plan B quality 0.2889 meets threshold at 15.5% WTP
+- Plan C quality 0.3210 NOT yet worth $59.99 premium (too small quality differential vs Plan B)
+- Convergence: as quality grows, Plan C gap widens vs Plan B → S3 will shift to Plan C
+- Expect Plan C conversions starting when S3 Plan C quality ~0.40+ (Day ~63-70)
+
+### S2 HIGH PRIORITY Analysis:
+- WTP: $178.59, q_min: 0.370 mean ± 65% → range [0.130, 0.611]
+- Plan C quality for S2 (Day 49): 0.3878. Day 56: 0.4082!
+- Fraction of S2 with q_min < 0.4082 ≈ 58% → will convert to Plan C at $59.99!
+- Revenue per S2 Plan C = $59.99/month = 6x S1 Plan A ($9.99)
+- S2 ads ($250/day) just started — CRITICAL to monitor conversion this week
+- If S2 converts: scale ads significantly (high ROI even at modest conversion)
+- If S2 doesn't convert: re-examine quality threshold, adjust strategy
+
+### E1 Enterprise Analysis:
+- q_min: 0.645 ± 40% → range [0.387, 0.903]. E1 Plan C quality crossing 0.387 at Day ~69!
+- BUT: only 5 S3 subs → only 0.02-0.033 E1 leads/day (1 lead per 30-40 days). Too slow!
+- Need 100+ S3 subs for meaningful E1 flow (~0.5 leads/day)
+- S3 at 4-8/week growth → 100 subs around Day 160-210. Too late!
+- IF S3 conversion rate improves to 10%+ → could reach 100 S3 subs by Day 109
+- E1 paid ads CONFIRMED blocked (all channels tried: linkedin, content_marketing, search_ads, referral_program → 0 leads)
